notes: The game launches and you can go through the menus just fine. Sound and wireless 360 controller work. The game crashes when trying to start a new game. PROTON_USE_WINED3D and PROTON_NO_FSYNC didn't help.
title: Ni no Kuni Wrath of the White Witch™ Remastered
Ni no Kuni Wrath of the White Witch™ Remastered

notes: Runs out of the box. but there are some graphic glitches with grass not being see through so it all looks like a tall green pillar and fences have some wierd black graphics. Not sure if windows users have this issue as well, couldnt find any complaints. but its totally playable anyways.
title: Ni no Kuni Wrath of the White Witch™ Remastered

notes: Use 4.2-9 to stop the game crashing past the main menu. the game functions fine but has strange graphical glitches such as a rectangle of artifacts stretching across the middle of the screen on some maps, and foliage/trees lacking transparency. is generally playable but i wouldn't call it comfortable.
title: Ni no Kuni Wrath of the White Witch™ Remastered
